title: AI YouTube Is Only Claude Hype Now
summary: Cole Medin critiques AI YouTube for repetitive Claude hype coverage and announces a shift toward building real systems on camera. He will publish one Wednesday video weekly plus three live streams to demonstrate engineering behind actual projects using Claude Code and other coding agents.
